title: Drone crashes in Romania as Russia strikes neighbouring Ukraine
content: Two British fighter jets were scrambled and 200 people were evacuated on Saturday after a drone crashed in Romania during a barrage of Russian strikes on its neighbour Ukraine.
snippet: Two British fighter jets were scrambled and 200 people were evacuated on Saturday after a drone crashed in Romania during a barrage of Russian strikes on its neighbour Ukraine.

title: Montenegro inches closer towards EU membership
content: Montenegro, which has been an EU accession candidate country since 2010, hopes to become the European Union's 28th member by 2028.
snippet: Montenegro, which has been an EU accession candidate country since 2010, hopes to become the European Union's 28th member by 2028.

title: UK House of Lords accused of 'obstructionism' as time runs out on assisted dying bill

title: Housing crisis - a test for Europe's social stability? MEPs clash in The Ring

title: Ukraine needs full not symbolic membership in the EU, Zelenskyy says
content: With a €90 billion loan for Kyiv unlocked and a new package of sanctions against Russia going ahead, attention is turning to Hungary’s long-standing veto on Ukraine’s EU accession.

title: Speed and deterrence: Germany's defence minister unveils first ever military strategy
content: Germany is reshaping its armed forces. The Bundeswehr is set to become faster, more capable and more technologically advanced, with the ability to strike targets precisely at longer range.

title: Gáspár Orbán, son of Hungary's outgoing prime minister, discharged from military

title: Cyprus: How the Iran war is shaping Europe’s closest frontier to the conflict
content: On 1 March, an Iranian-made Shahed drone launched from Lebanon hit the British airbase of Akrotiri in Cyprus, bringing the Iran war unexpectedly closer to Europe. This report explores the tensions shaping the European Union’s closest frontier to the conflict.

title: Does Zelenskyy have a stolen painting in his office?

title: Brussels' push to cut housing red tape faces criticism from EU countries

title: EU approves €90 billion loan for Ukraine after Hungary lifts controversial veto

title: Trump attacks against NATO allies 'painful', says former NATO chief
